tasks_completed: wrap qr_code handler in src/services.py with catalog registration, self-tested OK (15 services)
learnings: QRServer API (api.qrserver.com) is free, no key, returns binary image. Return URL pattern (not base64) is correct — trivial to wrap, 1 credit price.
catalog.register() does not accept a tags parameter — brief spec was wrong, omit tags.
